Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(hooks): HTTP hooks, PermissionRequest, command safety hardening (#20)

* feat(hooks): HTTP hooks, PermissionRequest, stable daemon port

Add HTTP hook support for Claude Code v2.1.63+ — daemon handles hook
requests directly via POST instead of spawning .cjs processes. Auto-
detected at `succ init` time with seamless command fallback for older
versions.

New hook events:
- PermissionRequest — auto-approve/deny permission dialogs via hook-rules
  (type="allow" skips dialog, type="error" blocks)
- SubagentStop — save subagent results to memory
- TaskCompleted — trigger memory curator immediately

Infrastructure:
- Deterministic daemon port from SHA-256(projectDir) with config override
- Command safety patterns extracted to reusable TS module
- CLAUDE_ENV_FILE support — propagate SUCC_DAEMON_PORT to Bash env
- Unified hook upgrade path (succ init detects transport change)
- Normalize 'postgres' → 'postgresql' in storage config

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
powered by [succ](https://succ.ai)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: succ <mindpalace@succ.ai>

* fix(storage): resolve TS2367 in postgres backend normalization

Cast backend type to string before comparing with 'postgres' to avoid
TypeScript strict type overlap error in CI.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
powered by [succ](https://succ.ai)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: succ <mindpalace@succ.ai>

* fix(hooks): address CodeRabbit review — 5 issues

- hook-rules: separate allow (2) from ask (1) priority to ensure
  deterministic sort order (deny=0, ask=1, allow=2, inject=3)
- daemon-port: only lowercase path on Windows; preserve case on
  Linux/macOS to respect case-sensitive filesystems
- session-start: guard CLAUDE_ENV_FILE write with checkDaemon() to
  avoid writing stale port from old .tmp/daemon.port
- init: use getConfig() (merges global + project) instead of reading
  .succ/config.json directly for hookPort resolution
- docs: add bash language tags to fenced code blocks

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
powered by [succ](https://succ.ai)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: succ <mindpalace@succ.ai>

* fix(security): harden command safety guard against bypass attacks

- Split chained commands (&&, ||, ;, |) before data-context check —
  prevents bypass via benign prefix chained with destructive command
- Allowlist now uses regex matching instead of substring includes() —
  prevents broad substring matches from exempting dangerous variants
- Add ReDoS guard (200 char max) on custom patterns and allowlist
- Remove matcher:'Bash' from PreToolUse cmd fallback — now runs for
  all tools (parity with HTTP hooks, .cjs already handled all tools)
- Sync all fixes to succ-pre-tool.cjs inline copy
- Update docs: allowlist format is now regex patterns

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
powered by [succ](https://succ.ai)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: succ <mindpalace@succ.ai>

* feat(hooks): port full PostToolUse logic to HTTP route

All 6 auto-capture patterns now work via HTTP (parity with .cjs):
1. Git commits — extract from output or -m flag
2. Dependency installs — npm/yarn/pnpm add detection
3. Test runs — pass/fail detection from output
4. File creation — Write tool for source files
5. Subagent results — Task/Explore/succ-* findings to memory
6. MEMORY.md sync — parse bullets, save each to long-term memory

Added PostToolSchema, parseMemoryMdBullets helper. Fixed saveMemory
parameter order (source vs type).

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
powered by [succ](https://succ.ai)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: succ <mindpalace@succ.ai>

* fix(hooks): address second CodeRabbit review — 4 issues

- Keep raw tool_output for Task subagent parsing (object payloads
  were collapsed to empty string, making structured output unreachable)
- Skip flags (-D, --save-dev) before extracting package name in
  dependency install detection
- Run command safety guard BEFORE allow/no-rule exits in
  PermissionRequest — dangerous commands now denied even with
  allow rules present
- Fix SubagentStop saveMemory arg order (source='auto-capture',
  type in options, consistent with PostToolUse)

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
powered by [succ](https://succ.ai)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: succ <mindpalace@succ.ai>

docs: add Part 8 to TODO — implement-time incremental verification

Root cause: code is never executed during implement, first runtime
check happens at verify Phase 3. No auto-fix loop exists when
failures occur. Proposes 4 mechanisms: task-level build verification,
pre-flight demo run, auto fix loop (max 3 retries), and build gate
as implement→verify transition condition.

Require dictionary or high cosine for structural fingerprint pairs

Two-tier gate: structural pairs need dictionary synonym confirmation
(min_matches=1) OR cosine >= 0.70 to survive. Eliminates ~90% of noise
from syntax_structural channel while preserving dictionary-confirmed
pairs like the Thomas tricolon (Georg 3.481 / DRN 6.1140).

Also exempts structural+dictionary pairs from single-word penalty —
the syntactic pattern match itself counts as additional evidence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: groups view reloads continuously — only reload on running→stopped transition

The poll was checking !scanSt.running && scanSt.folder === currentFolder
every 2 seconds. Since folder stays set after a scan completes, this was
always true, causing infinite reloads. Now tracks _prevScanRunning and
only reloads on the single transition from running to stopped.

commit.message:
Fix Google Search Console errors: skip schema on filtered pages

Only emit JobPosting JSON-LD schema on the canonical /jobs URL (no query params).
Filtered views like ?value=remote no longer emit schema, preventing mismatched
job validation errors. All 1,463 jobs are indexed from the single canonical page.
Also removed JS that overrode the canonical URL with query params.

Initial commit: WinMedic rescue USB toolkit v1.0.0

- build-usb.ps1: WinPE bootable USB creation script (ADK + format + copy)
- tools/menu.ps1: Interactive WinPE console menu, auto-launched on boot
- tools/disk-health.ps1: SMART disk check via smartctl / WMI fallback
- tools/eventlog-extractor.ps1: Last 500 critical/error events → HTML
- tools/chkdsk-runner.ps1: chkdsk /f /r on detected Windows drive
- tools/sfc-dism-runner.ps1: Offline SFC + DISM RestoreHealth
- tools/boot-repair.ps1: bootrec MBR/BCD + bcdboot UEFI repair
- tools/network-snapshot.ps1: Adapter info + connectivity ping test
- tools/sysinfo-collector.ps1: CPU/RAM/BIOS/OS/hotfix collection
- tools/run-all.ps1: Full scan orchestrator → generates HTML report
- report-template/report-generator.ps1: Aggregates JSON/TXT → HTML
- report-template/template.html: Dark-theme self-contained report UI
- README.md: Full documentation with prerequisites and usage guide
- init-github.ps1: Git + GitHub CLI publisher script

commit.message:
Diagnose share link blank page: show error, fix retry on failure

- Move deepLinkHandledRef assignment to after successful load so failed
  attempts can retry (previously the ref was set before the fetch, making
  any error permanently stuck with no retry)
- Surface the actual server error message in the alert so the cause is
  visible (e.g. 'Share link revoked', 'HTTP 404', etc.)
- Include HTTP status code in thrown error when response body has no message

fix(error): DB 카드 레이아웃 중첩 수정 — 기존 HTML 카드와 CSS 통일

--- debug-note ---
when:

* DB 문제풀이 페이지에서 카드 열기/접기 시

symptom:

* DB 카드 레이아웃이 중첩되어 보임

context:

* DB 카드 전용 overflow 오버라이드 5개가 기존 HTML 카드와 다르게 동작

root-cause:

* 기존 HTML 카드에 없는 overflow:hidden/visible 오버라이드가 레이아웃 충돌 유발

fix:

* DB 전용 overflow 오버라이드 5개 제거 (card, card.open, card-content, explanation, card-header)
* scroll-margin-top과 card-header top 값만 유지하여 기존 HTML과 동일한 CSS 동작으로 통일
* 메모 디버그 console.log 제거

verify:

* 기존 HTML 카드 CSS 규칙과 DB 카드 CSS 규칙 비교 확인
--- /debug-note ---

feat: UX corrections part 1 — tabs, reorder, text updates

- Merge 5 preview sections into single tabbed section with fade transition
- Reorder: Hero → Ejemplo real → Conflicto → Features → Tabs → 3 pasos → Pricing → Confianza → CTA
- Hero: "La mayoría..." instead of "El 67%..." (safer claim)
- Subtitle: "Eso no aparece en la cotización" (softer anti-broker tone)
- Conflicto title: "¿Por qué nadie te muestra estos números?"
- Conflicto descriptions shortened to ~2 lines each
- Varied CTAs: "Analiza gratis..." / "Pruébalo con tu propiedad" / "Haz tu primer análisis" / "Empieza ahora — es gratis"
- Sub-hero: "Tu primer análisis en 30 segundos" instead of "Análisis ilimitados"
- Pricing intro: explains free→pro upgrade flow
- Veredicto: "apuesta a la plusvalía futura — negociar el precio mejoraría..."
- Removed standalone demo section (content lives in tabs now)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): replace npm ci with npm install in image-studio frontend

The root .gitignore excludes package-lock.json (yarn workspace), so
the image-studio frontend's lock file is never committed. Use npm
install instead of npm ci which doesn't require a lock file.
